---
title: "Getting involved"
editor: 
  mode: source
---

# Research Experience Opportunities

Undergraduate students at UWM can get involved with the lab's research by volunteering, getting course credit, or applying for a fellowship to work as a Research Assistant.

- [Research Assistant](positions/research-assistant.qmd)

Qualified applicants can apply to do research in the lab as part of a Neuroscience PhD degree in the Department of Psychological and Brain Sciences at UWM.

- [Neuroscience PhD](positions/neuroscience-phd.qmd)

# Positions

Applicants with a Bachelor's degree in psychology, neuroscience, or a related field and relevant research experience can apply to work as a full-time Research Coordinator.

- [Research Coordinator](positions/research-coordinator.qmd)
